_meta: Sprint D-6 — canonical EN copy for the weekly report settings panel, archive, viewer, /unsubscribe-weekly page, banner, and backend PDF + email templates. Components currently inline these strings; this file is the translator's source of truth.
panel.title: Weekly Performance Report
panel.subtitle: A 4-6 page PDF report by email at the time you choose every Sunday.
banner.title: Your weekly performance report is ready
banner.subtitle: Generated by AI Co-Pilot
archive.title: Weekly Reports
archive.subtitle: Browse past weekly performance reports.
archive.empty: Your first weekly report will arrive on Sunday.
viewer.title: Weekly Report
unsub.promptSub: Pick an option below. Your account is not affected.
unsub.invalid: This link is invalid or has expired.
email.subject.default: Your Weekly Performance Report is Ready
email.preheader: Your weekly performance report is ready.
pdf.title: Weekly Performance
pdf.foundation.title: Welcome to Your First Week
pdf.foundation.body: A full week of data hasn't accumulated yet. Create invoices, add customers, link your bank — your first full report arrives next Sunday.
